description: Documentation generator for C++, C, Java, and other languages that automatically extracts documentation from annotated source code, improving research software maintainability through comprehensive API documentation.
name: doxygen

indicators.Maintainability: measures Maintainability by automatically generating comprehensive documentation from source code, improving code understanding, reducing onboarding effort, and supporting long-term software maintenance.

useCases: Generate API documentation automatically from annotated source code
Improve maintainability by providing clear and structured documentation
Support onboarding of new contributors through accessible code documentation
Ensure documentation stays synchronized with code through automated generation
